hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'graphify-out/graph.json') { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='UserPromptSubmit'; additionalContext='graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files.'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 4 }; exit 0"
